HGSS.374.0000:
This area is great for fishing.
Looking at all those people fishing,\r
did you feel like you wanted to try\r
fishing, too?\f
Would you like one of my Rods? [0200,0000]
HGSS.374.0003:
When you want to go fishing,
face the water and use the Rod first.\f
Then concentrate and look closely
at the water!\f
An “!” appears when a Pokémon
has taken a bite!\f
Press the A Button quickly to pull back
on the line.\f
You’ll see what happens next.\f
If there’s water, be it the sea or
a stream, try out your Rod.
HGSS.374.0005:
When you want to go fishing,
face the water and use the Rod first.\f
Then concentrate and look closely
at the water!\f
An “!” appears when a Pokémon
has taken a bite!\f
Press the A Button quickly to pull back
on the line.\f
You’ll see what happens next.
HGSS.374.0006:
What should I make my Pokémon hold?\f
Maybe an item that increases
its Attack power...
HGSS.374.0007:
Bonjour.
How are you?\r
Are you picking Apricorns? [0200,0000]
HGSS.374.0008:
Way to go, little Apricorn collector!\f
I feel so great, I want to give
you this!\f
HGSS.374.0009:
How come? What a waste!\f
I will show you how great
Apricorns are!\f
Take this first.\f
HGSS.374.0010:
Lure Ball!
This Poké Ball makes it easy to catch\r
the Pokémon that appear when you\r
go fishing!\f
Actually, this is made from Apricorns.
Consider those two as small gifts\r
from me.\f
If you want more, go to Azalea Town.
A man called Kurt can make special\r
Poké Balls out of Apricorns.\f
Apricorns rule!
HGSS.374.0011:
Kurt is the hero of every Apricorn
collector out there.\f
If you are to go to Azalea Town,
be sure to visit him.\f
Apricorn, Apricornier, Apricorniest!
